PostToolUse.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH;if(p&&p.endsWith('.js')){try{require('child_process').execSync('node --check '+p,{stdio:'pipe'});console.log('JS syntax OK');}catch(e){console.log('JS SYNTAX ERROR:',e.stderr.toString())}}" 2>/dev/null; true

ui-designer.description: UI/UX designer — Song Dynasty aesthetics, responsive layouts, visual quality

frontend-architect.description: Frontend architect — Next.js architecture, component design, data flow

content-curator.description: Content curator — hexagram interpretations, case studies, learning paths

data-engineer.description: Data engineer — CSV processing, build scripts, data pipeline

visualization-expert.description: Visualization expert — D3.js diagrams, hexagram graphs, interactive charts

ai-tutor-designer.description: AI tutor designer — conversational guidance, ethical boundaries, hexagram recommendations
